results.rendered_html: ślu (in gram.) N. of the Vikaraṇa [q.v.] of the 3rd class of roots in which there is elision of the conjugational affix a (ślu is one of the 3 technical terms [containing lu] for grammatical elision See 2. luk),  Pāṇ. i, 1, 61  &c.
